Changelog

Every shipped change.

Every release of One Link, every push to this site, in reverse chronological order. The git history is the source of truth; this page is the human-readable view of it.

2026-05-18

site v0.21.0-alpha.0+r48 - audit closeout

  • WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility pass: real focus rings on every interactive element; mobile-nav swapped from label-for-checkbox to real button aria-expanded; footer heading hierarchy fixed h4 to h3; 44 by 44 touch-target floor; contrast on dimmed text lifted to 4.5:1; forced-colors + prefers-contrast media queries.
  • Mobile + responsive: 100svh for iOS Safari URL-bar; env(safe-area-inset) for notch + landscape; tablet breakpoint 761-1024px; comparison-table overflow-scroll with edge shadow under 720px; WebGPU shader gated on desktop + non-saveData.
  • Performance: HTML cache-control gains s-maxage=300 + stale-while-revalidate=86400; modulepreload for bridge.js site-wide; document.hidden short-circuit in both render loops.
  • SEO + canonical URLs in worker: 301 lowercase canonical (/Features/ to /features/); 301 trailing-slash for content dirs (was 307 from assets); 301 /favicon.ico to /images/favicon.ico; HEAD on /download/source honored; dual theme-color (light + dark media); Twitter Card title/desc/image on all OG pages; designed /404.html wired via not_found_handling.
  • Trust pages added: /accessibility/, /transparency/ (warrant canary + government-request log), /changelog/.
  • .well-known/security.txt (RFC 9116) with disclosure policy and SLA.
  • Privacy: dropped Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * from HTML responses; deleted dist/_headers (worker is source of truth, removed the X-No-Tracking deception header it carried).
  • www -> apex 301 redirect at the worker layer (closes duplicate-200 problem; NEL/Report-To stripped on the redirect itself).
2026-05-16 .. 2026-05-17

site v0.21.0-alpha.0+r34 .. r47 - public preview

  • Positive-forward framing sweep across all pages: zero "what we do not do" / "five companies" / "what we cannot fix" copy.
  • Real ed25519-signed release attestations for Windows + Linux + source archive.
  • Live MeshPresence Durable Object: real "N here right now" pill (replaces hardcoded counter).
  • OS detection on home hero CTA + /download/ page CTAs.
  • Service Worker with verify-against-signed-manifest before serve; cached integrity mismatch evicts + refetches.
  • Repos migrated to IamOneYouAreOneWeAreOne organization with personal identifiers fully stripped.
2026-05-14

daemon ol_onion Sphinx T1.5 - Schnorr batch aggregation

  • Ristretto255 sign + verify with Pippenger MSM batch_verify; 2.6x speedup at N=64 over sequential verification.
  • 271 ol_onion tests, including 9 proptests at 1M iterations, 12 adversarial vectors, 7 KAT vectors.
  • Closes the last deferred Sphinx Tier-1 item.
2026-05-13

daemon Row 10 confidential-compute, Phase 1

  • ol_confidential crate: ConfidentialProvider trait + SoftwareProvider (ChaCha20-Poly1305 sealing + Zeroize).
  • AttestationDoc: post-quantum-hybrid + peer-nonce + 30s freshness + field-witness binding.
  • TLA+ spec, 46 tests / 0 failed, lib clippy -D warnings clean.
  • Coherence Mesh: 10 of 10 rows now shipped (Phase 1 of Row 10).
2026-05-11

daemon Phase E - coherence-field substrate

  • ol_coherence_field crate: ports the S_One stack (reaction-diffusion to Helmholtz to Green-function to BE-RAR to apparent-horizon anchor).
  • Three couplings: homology to field, field to prefetch, field to ratchet.
  • pyo3 daemon surface live; 12/13 plan gates flipped to Met with numerical evidence.
  • Bench: 10k peers in 1.74ms on a single CPU core.
Earlier history

Every commit since v0.1.0.

The full history is in the public git repository, signed and dated:

One Link

A free, private network for messages, files, and devices. Owned by no one. Belongs to everyone.
